rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TAHMAL GRIFFIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 09, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT TAHMAL GRIFFIN MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Defendant was properly served by a registered process server. Defendant had actual notice of the proceedings against her as evidenced by multiple communications from and with the Plaintiff. Defendant failed to meet her burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TAHMAL GRIFFIN ET AL

DEFENDANT TAHMAL GRIFFIN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship GRANTED, subject to opposition. rulings.Case Title: ERIK VAN DEN AKKER VS. JULIO CAESAR CARMONA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Order; Proposed Response
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 09, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT JULIO CARMONA Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment GRANTED, subject to; (1) opposition; (2) Defendant posting $6,990 with the Court no later than 4:00 p.m. on October 9, 2018 by 4:00 pm; and thereafter (3) Defendant filing his answer no later than October 9, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LESLIE WAN ET AL VS. FREDY MIRANDA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses And Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 09, 2018 line 8 PLAINTIFF LESLIE WAN, BRIAN KELLER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses And Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. This motion will be heard at 2:00 p.m. Discovery in this action is subject to unlawful detainer procedures. This Court did not modify the procedures by its limited consolidation order. Defendant's objections are overruled. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses (with production) without objections by 4:00 p.m. on October 10, 2018. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,300 to be paid by October 12, 2018. Sanction award shall be vacated if Defendant provides responses as ordered by the Court. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 990 GEARY I3, LP VS. JEREMY ROBERTS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 09, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT JEREMY ROBERTS, JAYSHAWN ANDERSON MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRATED in part and OFF CALENDAR in part. This motion is filed by Defendants Anderson and Roberts. Motion brought by defendant Roberts is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and no Order Shortening Time was ever requested or obtained by defendant Roberts. Defendant Anderson's Motion is GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendant filing and presenting a copy of the proof of personal service for this motion; (2) opposition; (3) Defendant presenting evidence of him being out of country on August 23, 2018; (3) Defendant posting $9,420 with the Court no later than 4:00 p.m. on October 9, 2018 by 4: 00 pm; and (4) Defendant filing his answer no later than October 9, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/CFH)
